summit.headline: $633,000 at risk across 8 deals, $433,000 in renewal/cross-sell/re-engage opportunity across 9 deals.

findings.title: Renewal-ready funded merchants
findings.detail: 4 funded deals, $305,000, >90 days untouched: D-0921, D-0935, D-0948, D-0959.
findings.recommendedAction: Call all merchants for renewal pitch

findings.title: Rotting deals
findings.detail: 3 deals stuck 14–27 days, $287,000, no touch 12–21 days: D-1041, D-1067, D-1090.
findings.recommendedAction: Escalate with owners and credit today

findings.title: Cross-sell funded merchants
findings.detail: 2 funded deals, $128,000, 34–47 days since last touch: D-1015, D-0972.

findings.title: Re-engage prior declines
findings.detail: 3 declined deals, $151,000, 74–140 days untouched: D-0810, D-0824, D-0790.
findings.recommendedAction: Re-speak and qualify for new offers

rules.name: Flag renewal-ready funded merchants
rules.trigger: Funded deal, 90+ days since funding, no 2nd product

rules.name: Escalate rotting deals
rules.trigger: Deal in stage 14+ days, no activity 10+ days
rules.action: Send Slack alert to owner and manager

rules.name: Cross-sell funded merchants
rules.trigger: Funded deal, 30+ days since funding, no 2nd product

rules.name: Re-engage declined deals
rules.trigger: Deal declined 60–180 days ago, no recent activity
rules.action: Create task for owner to re-speak

keystone.headline: $264,000 in renewal and re-engage opportunity, $255,000 at risk, 13 deals flagged.

findings.title: Renewal-ready funded merchants
findings.detail: 2 funded deals, $114,000, 104d+ untouched, both have 2nd product.
findings.recommendedAction: Call both merchants for renewal upsell

findings.title: Re-engage declined deals
findings.detail: 2 declined deals, $76,000, 80–95d since decline, no recent contact.

findings.title: Rotting deals in pipeline
findings.detail: 3 deals, $133,000, all 14–22d in stage, 11–18d no touch.
findings.recommendedAction: Escalate to deal owners for immediate action

findings.title: Going cold: untouched open deals
findings.recommendedAction: Task owners to follow up this week

findings.title: Cross-sell funded merchants
findings.detail: 2 funded deals, $74,000, 47–52d no touch, no 2nd product.

rules.name: Rotting deal alert
rules.trigger: 14+ days in stage, 10+ days no touch

apex.headline: $1,096,000 open, $726,000 funded, $673,000 at risk; 13 high-value renewal/cross-sell/re-engage opportunities.

findings.title: Renewal-ready funded merchants
findings.detail: 3 funded deals renewal-ready, $390,000 total; all untouched 99+ days.
findings.recommendedAction: Call all owners and pitch renewal

findings.title: Rotting high-value deals
findings.detail: 3 rotting deals, $385,000 total, 12–24 days stuck and untouched.
findings.recommendedAction: Escalate to deal owners and underwriting

findings.title: Open deals going cold
findings.detail: 3 open deals going cold, $288,000 total, 8–10 days no touch.

findings.title: Cross-sell funded merchants
findings.detail: 2 funded deals, $191,000 total, 44–50 days untouched, no second product.
findings.recommendedAction: Assign cross-sell task to account owner

rules.name: Rotting deal escalation
rules.trigger: Deal in stage 14+ days, no activity 7+ days
rules.action: Notify owner and underwriting for escalation

rules.name: Renewal window alert
rules.trigger: Funded deal 90+ days, no recent activity

rules.name: Cross-sell funded merchant
rules.trigger: Funded deal, no second product, untouched 30+ days

rules.name: Re-engage declined deal
rules.trigger: Deal declined 60–180 days ago, no recent activity
